sentence: 作为一个经营者，他很注重客户关系。
pinyin: Zuòwéi yī gè jīngyíngzhě, tā hěn zhùzhòng kèhù guānxi.
english: As a business manager, he pays great attention to customer relationships.

sentence: 这档综艺节目最近非常受欢迎。
pinyin: Zhè dàng zōngyì jiémù zuìjìn fēicháng shòu huānyíng.
english: This variety show has been very popular lately.

sentence: 慈善机构为城市贫民提供免费餐食。
pinyin: Císhàn jīgòu wèi chéngshì pínmín tígōng miǎnfèi cānshí.
english: The charity provides free meals for the urban poor.

sentence: 他根据现有证据做出了合理的推论。
pinyin: Tā gēnjù xiànyǒu zhèngjù zuòchū le hélǐ de tuīlùn.
english: He made a reasonable inference based on the available evidence.

sentence: 我们在附近的咖啡馆聊了两个小时。
pinyin: Wǒmen zài fùjìn de kāfēiguǎn liáo le liǎng gè xiǎoshí.
english: We chatted at the nearby café for two hours.
